title: platostoma mekongense
intro: Platostoma mekongense, also known as Mekong platostoma, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Platostoma mekongense include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
